entities.name: Principle-Based Debugging
entities.context: Framework for applying systematic principles when debugging issues

entities.name: P15: Complete Before Claiming
entities.context: Debugging principle requiring verification before assuming something works

entities.name: P16: Accuracy Over Sophistication
entities.context: Debugging principle favoring simple reproduction over complex speculation

entities.name: P19: Error Handling
entities.context: Debugging principle emphasizing log checking and full error message capture

entities.name: P21: Document Assumptions
entities.context: Debugging principle comparing expected behavior vs actual outcomes
